notes: Valuation is based on built-up area (1,195 sqft), which is the relevant metric for condo pricing. Recent Pavilion Residences subsales cluster around about RM1,540 psf, while current asking listings for ~1,233 to 1,509 sqft units range roughly RM1,450 to RM1,620 psf, with some higher outliers around RM1,739 to RM2,187 psf. Scaling those comparables to 1,195 sqft supports a market value around RM1.89M, with a realistic low-high band of RM1.72M to RM2.08M. Note: portal data is inconsistent on tenure; many sources describe Pavilion Residences as leasehold, while some individual listings label units as freehold, so the tenure stated by the user may not match all portal records.
